hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'public/css/main.css'; then echo 'BLOCKED: This is a generated file. Edit src/css/input.css instead.' >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -q 'src/css/input.css'; then cd /home/paradoks/projects/quakeworld/apps/matchscheduler && npx tailwindcss -i ./src/css/input.css -o ./public/css/main.css --minify 2>/dev/null; echo 'Tailwind CSS rebuilt.'; fi
